name: ralphthon-icml
description: Ralphthon @ICML onboarding, the official VESSL Cloud Cookbook autoresearch recipe on A100, local-first W&B observability, and world-model ideation skills for Codex

interface.shortDescription: Run official VESSL autoresearch safely on A100.
interface.longDescription: Codex workflows for Ralphthon @ICML: attendee orientation, research and the pinned official VESSL autoresearch recipe on A100, local-first W&B experiment tracking, Weave tracing, platform onboarding, and testable world-model ideation.
defaultPrompt: Create a Ralphthon @ICML attendee welcome pack
Use auto-research for general Track 1, the pinned official VESSL cookbook on an approved A100 with local W&B tracking, or a Track 2 Review Agent plus result
Guide me through W&B onboarding with an offline-first run
Set up VESSL Cloud and review compute cost before creating a workspace
Turn a world-model idea into a falsifiable experiment
Use $weave-add-tracing to add and verify Weave tracing in an AI application
Use $wandb-track-experiment to track iterative experiments and alerts
Use $wandb-project-analyst to analyze live W&B project data
Walk me through the W&B Models hands-on notebook
Walk me through the W&B Weave hands-on notebook
